title: Classes
intro: In Awareness Through Movement® (ATM) lessons, participants perform slow, mindful movements under the guidance of a practitioner, focusing on their sensations.

principles.title: Absence of strain
principles.text: Movements are performed with ease, without effort and not through pain, allowing the brain to relearn rather than simply training the muscles.

principles.title: Mind–body connection
principles.text: The method integrates biology, physics, and psychology, viewing the person as a whole.

imageAlt: Awareness Through Movement class in a studio
